overall settings.title: Furniture
overall settings.description: Play as a newly arrived sofa in the central hall. Upgrades such as softer cushions {lemonchiffon|encourage potential sitters}. Relocation may make a difference, if you can manage it somehow, whether that be to a different spot in the room or somewhere else entirely.

items.name: @Beige Sofa
items.description:
Yes, this is your player character. 😊 Its role is mostly passive, observing and planning.

Pet hair and spilled food are not something this sofa appreciates.

items.name: Brand New Lounge Chair
items.description:
All black leather, seems suspicious.

This looks like potential competition, intent on getting people to sit on it instead, perhaps for some insidious purpose such as giving them a backache.

items.name: 🌷Coffee Table
items.description: Low glass table with flowers in the middle. Saucers to hold teacups.

items.name: Family
items.description: Sum totals for all family members, possibly including pets and servants.

items.name: 🔥Fireplace
items.description: You're not a fan of the dangerous sparks, although if it makes people happy, then being close might be worth the risk.

items.name: 🕰️Grandfather Clock
items.description:
Drives everyday affairs in this scenario. Tells time, although it must constantly be wound by hand. 

During the day or other likely times, try running for what counts as an hour (real time 8s). It can potentially run for multiple hours, until something happens.

items.name: 🎨Sofa Painting
items.description: Your family is so pleased with you that they hire a painter to memorialize you for future generations. This picture would look lovely on the wall in the Central Hall.

locations.name: Central Hall
locations.description: Used for both transit and gathering.

locations.name: Dining Room
locations.description: A popular destination, as humans require food every day for sustenance. Servants are often in this area to prepare meals.

locations.name: House
locations.description: You don't know everything about it yet (you were initially wrapped on arrival and couldn't see), but it seems to be rather large, with several people living in it.

locations.name: Master Bedroom
locations.description: The creaky bed is a good indication of how long the master and missus are sleeping.

locations.name: Northeast Room
locations.description: Since there is another room to the side of this one, this room must be open enough to make it easy to walk through. Reginald sleeps here.

locations.name: Nursery
locations.description: There's another room back there, because you often hear Francis stomp into the northwest room, then a door closes and the footsteps become much quieter. It's where Lucy sleeps too.

locations.name: Outside
locations.description: Nearby are gardens and a forest for hunting.

locations.name: Study
locations.description: Shelves filled with books. The desk is a bit dusty as Charles doesn't always keep up with paperwork. Others in the family (but not Dash or Mittens) may use it for reading.

characters.name: 👨🏼Charles
characters.description:
The husband, not yet middle aged. Pleasant although a bit lazy and entitled. Has an actual title, although people don't normally use it when addressing him.

Schedule
~~~~~~~~
Morning: Comes from northeast room.

characters.name: 🐕Dash
characters.description: Irish wolfhound, fast and strong enough to encircle deer during a hunt.

characters.name: 👩🏽Eliza
characters.description:
Cute young maidservant that comes to the house for work every day. Cooks and cleans, finishing up in the kitchen early afternoon before moving on to the rest of the house. Might be exhausted enough to sit on the sofa when the master, or more importantly, the missus, isn't around.

Schedule
~~~~~~~~
Morning: Comes inside and goes to dining room.
Early Afternoon: Comes from dining room.
Evening: Leaves the house.

characters.name: 👦🏽Francis
characters.description:
School-age boy, expected to study hard but often overlooked, leaving plenty of opportunities for playing outside and getting into mischief.

Schedule
~~~~~~~~
Morning: Comes from northwest room.

characters.name: 👶Lucy
characters.description:
Baby girl, toddler. Gets grumpy if not put to bed early enough. Doesn't see the point of having rules, and has the intention of breaking them whenever possible, although not nearly clever enough to avoid getting caught.

Schedule
~~~~~~~~
Unpredictable.

characters.name: 👩🏿Margaret
characters.description:
The wife. Pretty and intelligent, with a strong sense of self-worth — sometimes critical of her husband, the staff, and even the furniture.

Schedule
~~~~~~~~
Morning: Comes from northeast room.

characters.name: 🐈Mittens
characters.description: Shorthair cat with a dense coat, white fur on the paws, stocky and well-built. Good mouser.

characters.name: 👴🏾Reginald
characters.description:
The senior servant, and old man, practically part of the family, now primarily manages and has some freedom for leisure. Punctual; doesn't sleep late. Maybe a nice soft sofa is just what he needs to rest those weary bones.

Schedule
~~~~~~~~
Early morning: Comes from northwest room.

attribs.name: Arrival 1st
attribs.description: Time first seen entering the room each day.

attribs.name: Arrival 2nd
attribs.description: Second time seen entering the room each day.

attribs.name: Arrival 3rd
attribs.description: Third time seen entering the room each day.

attribs.name: Favor
attribs.description: How someone feels about you (the sofa), up to 100.

attribs.name: Proximity
attribs.description:
How many tiles to get from one place on the grid to another, not including the starting tile. It often depends on the path, where they're coming from and going to.

Closer proximity increases likelihood of interaction. Typically, divide likelihood by proximity.

attribs.name: Sleepy
attribs.description: 10 is exhausted, 1 is wide awake and eager to move.

attribs.name: Softness
attribs.description: Soft is cozy — is that what people want in furniture?

attribs.name: Wear Level
attribs.description: How worn down furniture covering or other parts are. 0 is brand new, 100 is completely done for.

events.name: Chance of Arrival
events.description:
Adjust difficulty based on likelihood such as how many people would be awake. The determining values are relevant information only, not to directly adjust dice.

If successful, check schedules to see if we know who comes, and if no one is scheduled, [roll to see who it might be](/play/event/5).

events.name: Chance to Sit
events.description:
Maybe they walk on through, or maybe they sit somewhere. Hopefully on you.

Add all factors to max die, then divide by proximity, which you should set to roughly the number of tiles away.

events.name: Encounter Outcome
events.description:
Determine whether the outcome is pleasant, and a brief sit or perhaps a full-fledged nap. The result will affect the subject's favor towards you.

Add all factors to both dice.

events.name: Upgrade
events.description: Chance of an upgrade, minor such as softer pillows, or major such as converting to a larger sofa. Wear and tear typically makes it more likely to get a repair or upgrade.

events.name: Who Arrives
events.description: After a successful arrival roll, if it's not clear from the schedule who might be arriving, roll from this list to get a better picture.
